info.description: This interface can be used to access ION Process monitors and workflows for modeling.
info.title: ION Process Model Rest API

get.summary: get all the activation policies, it is possible to filter on name and updatedafter (format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z', so for instance 2020-09-29T18:46:19Z)

400.description: Invalid input activation policy, activation policy already exists or activation policy name missing

get.summary: get the activation policy with the specified name

400.description: Invalid input activation policy or activation policy name missing
Errors exist in activate Activation Policy

get.summary: get all the alarm templates, it is possible to filter on name and updatedafter (format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z', so for instance 2020-09-29T18:46:19Z)

400.description: Invalid input alarm template, alarm template already exists or alarm template name missing

get.summary: get the alarm templates with the specified name

400.description: Invalid input alarm template or alarm template name missing

get.summary: Gets the editable matrices header information ,it is possible to filter on name , matrix type, matrix status and updatedafter (format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z', so for instance 2020-09-29T18:46:19Z)
get.description: Retrieves the latest versions of all editable matrix headers.

post.description: Creates a new approval or decision matrix

400.description: Invalid input matrix or matrix already exists

get.description: Retrieves the latest version matrix for given matrixName.

put.description: Updates the existed approval or decision matrix

400.description: Invalid input matrix or matrix name missing

delete.summary: Deletes the matrix with status active or non-active.
delete.description: Removes the specified matrix from Business Rules.

put.summary: Approves and activates the specified matrix which has been submitted.
put.description: Allows the pending matrix for approval.

put.summary: Reject the matrix that has been submitted for approval.
put.description: Disallow the pending matrix for approval.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The reject Comment to reject the matrix.

400.description: Invalid input or Invalid matrix name

put.summary: Reverts to the last approved version.
Submits the editable matrix for approval.
put.description: Changes the matrix status from editable.

put.summary: Undo Submit the matrix for approval which has been submitted.
put.description: Changes the matrix status to editable.

get.summary: get all the monitors, it is possible to filter on name and updatedafter (format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z', so for instance 2020-09-29T18:46:19Z)

400.description: Invalid input monitor, monitor already exists or monitor name missing

get.summary: get the monitor with the specified name

400.description: Invalid input monitor or monitor name missing

get.summary: get all the workflows, it is possible to filter on name and updatedafter (format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z', so for instance 2020-09-29T18:46:19Z)

400.description: Invalid input workflow, workflow already exists or workflow name missing

get.summary: get the workflow with the specified name

400.description: Invalid input workflow or workflow name missing

actionType.description: Action type decides which action need to be performed Approval/Decision.

identifier.description: The identifier of a user or group. A user is identified by the IFS Identity2. A group is identified by an IFS Distribution Group name.

displayName.description: The full name of the distribution.

managerOf.description: Indicator if an email notification should be sent to this Distribution of the manager.

sendEmail.description: Indicator if an email notification should be sent to this Distribution.

enumerationName.description: code names from the existed codes.

rejectComment.description: Reject comment can be used to reject the matrix.

header.description: The header information for specifying the parameters.

actionHeaders.description: Action headers for both approval and decision matrix.

variableHeaders.description: Variable headers to set the conditions for matrix

dataType.description: The data type of the parameter.

restriction.description: Can be used to set the restriction for string data type with restriction type (HYPERLINK,USER,GROUP,CODE )only.

rejectComment.description: Reject Comment to reject the matrix.

restrictionType.description: Restriction type for string data type.

value.description: Restriction value only for the restriction type CODE and USER

data.description: The value to be set for comparison.

secondVariableName.description: The second variable name for comparison.

variableName.description: Name of the variable to add condition
